ValidationRule.description: If website role is different from No Profile, the fields Website First Name, Website Last Name, Website Login, Website Company, Website Country and Website Language are mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( WebsiteRole__c ))), NOT(ISPICKVAL(WebsiteRole__c,'1' )) , AND( OR( ISBLANK( FirstNameWebsite__c ), ISBLANK( LastNameWebsite__c ), ISBLANK(WebsiteCompany__c), ISBLANK( WebsiteLogin__c ), ISBLANK(TEXT( WebsiteCountry__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT( WebsiteLanguage__c )) )), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z9hS'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UE'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UC'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000s3v6') , $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The fields Website First Name, Website Last Name, Website Login, Website Company, Website Country, Website Language are mandatory if website role is different from No Profile
